title: MT5 Harness And Executable Certification
objective: Make MT5 the authoritative executable validation layer for MT5-targeted deployment.
build_items: Define the MT5 certification envelope including tester mode, delay model, tick provenance, and symbol/account snapshots.
Require baseline known-good reproduction before treating incident replays as trustworthy.
Classify deterministic engines as `deployment_grade`, `research_only`, or `untrusted` based on MT5 parity.
checkpoint_targets: MT5 certification contract exists and includes tick provenance.
Harness trust status is separated from candidate alpha claims.
exit_criteria: No MT5 replay is treated as authoritative without harness certification.
notes: Beginning Phase 4 implementation by wiring Goblin MT5 certification into the existing parity and replay trust flow.

Completed Phase 4 by writing Goblin MT5 certification artifacts for parity and incident replay runs, deriving tick provenance from tester mode, and requiring deployment-grade certification before MT5 replay evidence can lock official parity authority.
